workflows.name: Full feature development lifecycle
workflows.trigger: a new feature with no existing spec

steps.action: Implement in thin vertical slices with /build
Prove behavior and debug failures with /test
Validate and open the PR with /ship

workflows.name: Deep PR review with security and performance passes

steps.action: Run the security agent on the diff
Run the qa agent for test-coverage gaps
Run a performance pass on hot paths
Synthesize findings and post a single review verdict

workflows.name: Protocol-compliant session lifecycle
workflows.trigger: the start of any agent work session

steps.action: Create the session log with session-init
Run scoped validation and close out with session-end
